title: zeyherella mayumbensis
intro: Zeyherella mayumbensis, also known as the Mayumbensis tree or Mayumbensis bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. Traditionally, Zeyherella mayumbensis has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Zeyherella mayumbensis is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
